title: lotononis prolifera
intro: Lotononis prolifera, also known as the "stick plant" or "tamarugo," is a type of flowering plant native to southern Africa. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms associated with malaria. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other compounds that offer health benefits, such as antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. In traditional medicine, Lotononis prolifera is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it may also be used in the form of a tincture or ointment to support the treatment of various health conditions.
